description: Displays the expanded step-by-step working for an event probability. Shows individual sample point probabilities summed to the result. For conditional type, shows P(E|F) = P(E∩F)/P(F) with substituted values.

arguments.name: type
arguments.description: Which probability to expand: event (P(E)), given (P(F)), intersection (P(E∩F)), conditional (P(E|F) formula, default), sample (1/|S|)

arguments.name: display
arguments.description: Custom AsciiMath label for the left-hand side

examples.expression:
S = sspace(coin(3), at(4,10), view(10,10))
E = event(S, "at least 2 H", given("first = T", c(steelblue)), fc(red))
eventdetails(E, at(22,10), type(event), display("P(E)"))

eventdetails(E, at(22,10), type(event), display("P(E)"))
eventdetails(E, at(24,10), type(given), display("P(F)"))
eventdetails(E, at(26,10), type(intersection), display("P(E nn F)"))
eventdetails(E, at(28,10), type(conditional), display("P(E|F)"))
